description: Support ticket close: the confirm gate, the invalid-ticket_id rejection (confirm set so both reach it), and the close POST once confirmed.

cases.name: requires confirm before closing
cases.expect_error: This closes a support ticket. Set confirm=true to proceed.

cases.name: rejects non-positive ticket_id
cases.expect_error: ticket_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This closes a support ticket. Set confirm=true to proceed.
